description_long: This cabin is constructed from repurposed green shipping containers, stacked to form a two-level structure with a flat, weathered metal roof. The exterior features prominent white stenciled text reading 'NUGO SHIPPING' and various hazard and shipping labels, giving it an industrial, utilitarian appearance. Wooden railings and staircases provide access to the upper level and a spacious deck area, while a large window with a metal shutter and a covered entryway add functional detail. The surfaces show signs of rust, wear, and patchy paint, suggesting prolonged outdoor exposure. The cabin is elevated on metal posts, with open space beneath and a ramp leading up to the main entrance. The overall design blends industrial and makeshift elements, suitable for urban or post-industrial environments.
description: A two-story cabin made from stacked green shipping containers, featuring wooden railings, stairs, a large window, and a weathered flat roof. The exterior is marked by industrial stenciling and visible signs of wear.
description_view_0: This view highlights the main staircase, the upper deck with wooden railings, and a large window with a metal shutter on the side.
description_view_1: The side view showcases the 'NUGO SHIPPING' text, multiple shipping labels, and the covered entryway beneath the upper deck.
description_view_2: This angle emphasizes the stacked container structure, the upper deck, and the prominent white stenciling on the side.
description_view_3: The rear view reveals the ramp leading to the entrance, the back of the upper deck, and the metal posts supporting the structure.
attribute_roof_type: flat roof with partial metal overhangs and visible weathering
attribute_window_arrangement: One large rectangular window with a metal shutter on the upper level, asymmetrically placed on the side; no other windows visible
attribute_door_placement: One main door located beneath the upper deck, accessible via a ramp at the rear; no other exterior doors visible
